title: othake callosum
side_effects: Othake callosum can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe headaches, dizziness, and nausea in individuals who consume it excessively. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxic compounds can also lead to liver damage, kidney failure, and respiratory distress. Additionally, improper use of othake callosum can cause allergic reactions, including skin rashes, itching, and swelling. If ingested in large quantities, it can even cause cardiac arrest, coma, or even death in severe cases.
